title: Town website for Jackman, Maine (ZIP 04945)

requirements.text: Create a homepage for the Town of Jackman, Maine (ZIP 04945) that prominently displays the town name, a welcome message, and key navigation to all sections of the site.

quotes: make a website for my town which is named Jackman Maine my zip code is 04945

acceptanceCriteria: Homepage displays 'Jackman, Maine' and '04945' visibly
A welcoming hero section is present
Navigation links to all major sections are accessible from the homepage

requirements.text: Create an 'About Jackman' section that includes a brief description of the town, its location in Somerset County, Maine, and highlights such as its proximity to the Canadian border and outdoor recreation.
acceptanceCriteria: Section exists with descriptive text about Jackman, Maine
Geographic and notable highlights are mentioned

requirements.text: Create a 'Town Services' section listing common municipal services such as Town Office contact information, public works, and emergency services.
acceptanceCriteria: Town Services section is present and readable
At least three service categories are displayed

requirements.text: Create a 'Local Events & News' section that allows town administrators to post announcements and upcoming events. Store events and announcements in the backend with title, date, and description fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores event/announcement records with title, date, and description
Frontend displays a list of upcoming events and announcements
Events are sorted by date

requirements.text: Create a 'Recreation & Outdoors' section highlighting Jackman's outdoor activities such as snowmobiling, fishing, hiking, and the Moose River, with descriptive text and relevant imagery.
acceptanceCriteria: Recreation section is present with at least four activity highlights
Section includes the generated outdoor/nature imagery

requirements.text: Create a 'Contact Us' section displaying the Town of Jackman's address (ZIP 04945), a placeholder phone number, and a simple contact form with name, email, and message fields. Store submitted messages in the backend.
acceptanceCriteria: Contact section displays town address with ZIP 04945
Contact form accepts name, email, and message inputs
Submitted form data is stored in the backend
User receives a confirmation message after submission

requirements.text: Apply a cohesive visual theme inspired by the rugged, forested wilderness of northern Maine — using deep forest greens, warm slate grays, and natural wood-toned accents. Typography should feel sturdy and welcoming. Layout should be clean and easy to navigate for all ages.
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses deep greens, slate grays, and warm neutral accents throughout
Typography is consistent and readable across all sections
Layout is responsive and accessible on desktop and mobile

requirements.text: Render the generated images (hero landscape, outdoor recreation scene) as static assets served from frontend/public/assets/generated and display them in the appropriate site sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated
Hero section displays the panoramic landscape image
Recreation section displays the outdoor activities image

constraints: Town name must always appear as 'Jackman, Maine' and ZIP code as '04945' throughout the site
All Motoko logic must remain in a single backend actor
nonGoals: Real-time features such as live chat or push notifications
Integration with external APIs (weather, maps, social media)
User authentication or resident login portal

required: Panoramic wilderness landscape of a small northern Maine town with a calm lake, dense pine forest, and mountains in the background under a dramatic sky (jackman-hero.dim_1440x600.png)
Collage-style outdoor recreation illustration showing snowmobiling, fishing, and hiking in a forested Maine setting with autumn and winter tones (jackman-recreation.dim_800x400.png)
Simple pine tree and moose silhouette logo mark for the town of Jackman Maine (jackman-logo.dim_256x256.png)
